stemHtml: Regarding special VFR departures, which of the following phrases can you expect to hear?

options.a: special VFR to LEMD, passing Wicken VOR, climbing 3000 feet.
options.b: leave control zone special VFR via route Whiskey, 3000 feet or below, report Whiskey one.
options.c: via route Whiskey, cleared 3000 feet or below, report Whiskey one as special VFR.
options.d: cleared to leave the control zone, VFR under special routing conditions via route Whiskey, 3000 feet or below, report Whiskey one.
